items.title: [正面] Slay the Spire meets dark fantasy horror (Lovecraf...
items.summary:
Slay the Spire meets dark fantasy horror (Lovecraft) meets gacha. 

STORY 
Probably the best story I've seen so far in any gacha game - IF you like grittier and darker stories (Mihoyo could never): Very refreshing to see  darker topics and characters actually die in the story. 

COMBAT 
Combat has lots of depth as well - its quite a unique re-interpretation of STS combat with active hero abilities and teambuilding aspects. Keep in mind though that this is not a deckbuilder - its a teambuilding centered approach (JRPG-esque) 

Summary; Crazy how no one is talking about this game - This is actually a hidden gem. Recommended for any gacha or Roguelite fan that likes horror or dark fantasy.

items.summary: 福利很多，推荐只养一个限定 然后找大佬接个90级嘎嘎乱杀。这游戏就相位牢和禁区牢，奖励是大后期突破 所以打不打无所谓。至少我是每天10分钟活动扫荡一下就下线了。时间多的可以多肝一下，进不去的把加速器关了就能进游戏了，

items.title: [正面] Translation is washed but the gameplay carries thi...
items.summary:
Translation is washed but the gameplay carries this gacha.
Realms, exalts, rouses and relics; not to mention chapter specific gamechangers make for varied strategies and a great cardgame.
The gacha dripfeeds you just enough currency and characters for you to build different teams as you get bored of what you started with.
